name: SCC_CurrentDemandReq
title: SCC_CurrentDemandReq
syntax: void SCC_CurrentDemandReq ( byte SessionID[], float TargetVoltage, float TargetCurrent)
description: The callback is called as soon as a Current Demand Request is received. Further details that are transmitted in this request can be queried with

parameters.name: SessionID
parameters.description: 8-byte long SessionID of SCC connection, range: 0 – 0xFF FF FF FF FF FF FF FF
